title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 140.680 - Power to collect such taxes
text:
140.680.  Power to collect such taxes. — The power to collect such city or incorporated town tax or special assessments before sale is hereby given to the county collector after said delinquent list is received by him.
(RSMo 1939 § 11203) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9971; 1919 § 12961; 1909 § 11513
